workflow.title: Thin Workflow
workflow.objective: Produce a reviewed skill release packet with local validation evidence.
workflow.trigger: /jm:harden-skill thin-workflow is invoked for one active skill.
preconditions: Git status is clean before edits.

inputs.name: skill_slug
inputs.description: Kebab-case skill identifier selected for the hardening iteration.

steps.title: Confirm Scope
steps.desc: Coordinator confirms exactly one active skill.
steps.whyThisMatters: Without a single active skill, unrelated changes can hide regressions.
steps.actionInstruction: Run git status and record the active skill slug.
steps.promptToUse: Confirm the active skill and branch name.
steps.expectedOutput: Scope packet with active_skill and branch fields.
steps.recoveryAction: Stop and ask for the active skill.

workflow.mainOutput: ReleasePacket markdown with branch, checks, and decision.
DoD: Per-skill DoD command passes with dod=pass.
Script contract command passes with warnings=0 errors=0.
qaChecklist: All 17 top-level workflow fields are present.
Every step has 12 fields and an observable validation rule.

kpis.measurement: Count non-zero exits across validation commands.
Count diff paths outside allowed scope.

workflow.errorHandling: Log the failing command and block ledger completion.
